brief_notes: Well-written anatomical atlas paper. All key numbers match extraction: 87 PRV152-positive nuclei, hypothalamus 1177.25±62.75, midbrain/pons 1065±22.39, hindbrain medulla 495.25±33.49, forebrain 237.5±15.08, cortex 104.75±4.64, thalamus 65.25±7.78, 4.7×10^9 pfu/mL, 5 loci, 150 nL, N=6, 25 μm sections, 18h primary Ab incubation. Figures are referenced (Fig counts, validation, circuit) but main.tex contains NO \begin{figure} or \includegraphics commands — figures were generated in figures/ directory but not embedded. Methods table is thorough. Good discussion linking to pain modulation circuits.
